Video.summary: Did you know that baby dogs were called whelps until the late 16th century?

Video.summary: Did you know that Chameleons have the fastest tongues of any animal?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Reptiles

Video.summary: Did you know that Golden Retrievers can take 300-400 breaths per minute?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Retrievers

Video.summary: Did you know that cockatoos live for 60 years?

Video.summary: Did you know that Female kangaroos have the ability to delay pregnancy until the conditions are right?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Marsupials

Video.summary: Huskies can have heterochromia, a condition where one eye is blue and the other is brown.
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Siberian Huskies

Video.summary: Did you know cats have 230 bones? That’s a whopping 24 more bones than humans!
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Cats
